raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I made a purchase on a website for {$57.00}, this website never responded to any requests for a shipping update, never shipped any items and I have not received any items from the website. The website now no longer exists and was a fradulent website collecting purchases and never fulfilling that obligation to customers. I notified my credit card company that this purchase was at a fradulent website and they have responded that they can't do anything about it, despite no services being fulfilled and my not receiving the items ordered.
